title: memory instantiation takes a long time and consume a lot of memory

features.name: large unpacked array memory declaration
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array memory declaration where the array size is computed as a power of two (2**AW) resulting in 65536 or more entries
features.snippet:
localparam NPOS = 2 ** AW;
reg [DW-1: 0] ram [0: NPOS-1];

features.name: dual_port memory write with posedge clock
features.description: Code should include a synchronous write port using posedge clock to a memory array

features.name: dual_port memory async read
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous read port from a memory array with read address in sensitivity list
